from dsl import *

    x1 = width(I)
    x2 = asobject(I)
    x3 = hperiod(x2)
    x4 = height(x2)
    x5 = astuple(x4, x3)
    x6 = ulcorner(x2)
    x7 = crop(I, x6, x5)
    x8 = rot90(x7)
    x9 = double(x1)
    x10 = divide(x9, x3)
    x11 = increment(x10)
    x12 = repeat(x8, x11)
    x13 = merge(x12)
    x14 = rot270(x13)
    x15 = astuple(x4, x9)
    O = crop(x14, ORIGIN, x15)
